name: Session Runner
description: Runtime engine for executing sessions safely. Progress tracking, scope enforcement, manual action prompts, handoff validation.

post_install_actions.description: Open project-state.json and confirm your user profile settings are correct.
post_install_actions.why: Your communication preferences were recorded during init. Confirm them before your first session.

commands.name: /start-session
commands.description: Begin or resume a working session.

commands.name: /end-session
commands.description: Close a session and save progress.

commands.name: /set-stack
commands.description: Declare or update the tech stack.

commands.name: /check-dependencies
commands.description: Run a manual dependency verification pass.

commands.name: /view-flags
commands.description: Review all open flags and their priority.

commands.name: /resolve-flag
commands.description: Mark a flag as resolved with a reason.
